subparts.text: Explain the function of the Level Shifter stage of an op-amp. Also, give circuit for the same.
What is cross over distortion in output stage of op-amp? How it is eliminated?
Explain the Barkhausen criterian for oscillators.
Draw input versus output waveforms for op-amp differentiator for Sine wave and Square wave inputs.
Draw comparison of uncompensated op-amp with dominant-pole and pole-zero frequency compensated op-amps in terms of their Gain vs frequency curves, transfer functions, advantages, and disadvantages.
Define Common Mode Rejection Ratio . If CMRR of a differential amplifier using an op-amp is 100 dB and the output voltage for a differential input is 2V. Find out the common mode gain in dB.
Define the following Op-amp parameters and also explain their respective compensation circuits:- i) Input Offset Current ii) Total Output Offset Voltage
Draw and explain the operation of Wien Bridge Oscillator. Calculate mathematical expressions for its frequency of oscillation and Gain ‘A’ for sustained oscillations.
Draw circuit diagram of log-amplifier with saturation current and temperature compensation and calculate output voltage V0 for this circuit.
What is hysteresis width? In the below circuit of Schmitt trigger, R2 = 100 Ω, R1 = 50 kΩ, Vref = 0 V, vi = 1 Vpp sine wave and saturation voltage = ± 14 V. Determine threshold voltages VUT and VLT.
